communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Freedom of Information Act, I hereby request the following records:

- Data from the 2024 BRFSS Annual Survey optional module on sexual orientation and gender identity (SOGI).
- Data from the 2024 BRFSS Annual Survey using the gender categories that were in use before they were changed in response to Executive Order 14168. I have attached a screenshot from the 2023 BRFSS Annual Survey so that you can see the categories that I am looking for.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 20 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Jessica Elm

title: DC FOIA Request for Records Concerning Rosean Barnes

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Freedom of Information Act, I hereby request the following records:

To the FOIA Officer,  
Metropolitan Police Department of the District of Columbia

Pursuant to the District of Columbia Freedom of Information Act, I request copies of any and all records maintained by the Metropolitan Police Department concerning me.

I am requesting records about myself.

My identifying information is as follows:

Identifying Information:
Full Name: Rosean Barnes
Date of Birth:11.29.1994
Current Address: 6956 Hanover Parkway unit 200
Greenbelt MD 20770
Telephone:2028978873
Email: roseanbarnes@gmail.com


I request a search for any and all records concerning me, including but not limited to:

- incident reports
- arrest records
- investigative records
- field interview records
- complaint records
- call for service records
- dispatch records
- body worn camera records, if any
- notes, memoranda, correspondence, or communications mentioning me
- records in which I am the subject
- records in which I am referenced, named, or otherwise identified

Please search all files, databases, indices, and other record systems reasonably likely to contain responsive records.

Date Range for Search: [All dates, or specify a range]  
Relevant Locations, Officers, or Incidents: [If known, provide details. If not, write “Unknown”]

I request that responsive records be provided in electronic format if possible.

If any portion of the requested records is withheld, please provide all reasonably segregable non exempt portions and identify the specific basis for each withholding.

If there are any fees associated with this request, please inform me in advance if the total will exceed $[25.00 or other amount].

Please contact me if you need additional information to process this request.

Sincerely,  
Rosean Barnes  
March 5,2026

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 20 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

rosean barnes

title: Request for Complete VA Medical Records Concerning Rosean Barnes

communications.subject: Freedom of Information Act Request: Request for Complete VA Medical Records Concerning Rosean Barnes
communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Freedom of Information Act, I hereby request the following records:

To the VA Release of Information Office,

I am requesting a complete copy of all of my medical and health records maintained by the Department of Veterans Affairs concerning me.

I am the individual who is the subject of these records, and I am making this request on my own behalf.

My identifying information is as follows:

Identifying Information:
Full Name: Rosean Barnes
Date of Birth:11.29.1994
Current Address: 6956 Hanover Parkway unit 200
Greenbelt MD 20770
Telephone:2028978873
Email: roseanbarnes@gmail.com

I am requesting the fullest and most complete copy of my VA medical record, including but not limited to:

- all doctors’ notes
- all progress notes
- all nursing notes
- all mental health notes, to the extent releasable
- all medication and prescription records
- all lab results
- all imaging and radiology reports
- all discharge summaries
- all consultation reports
- all diagnoses and treatment plans
- all handwritten notes and scanned paper notes
- all administrative notes associated with my care
- all records maintained in electronic systems and any archived paper files

Please include records from all dates of treatment and from all VA facilities, clinics, hospitals, community based outpatient clinics, and archived records systems reasonably likely to contain my information.

If any portion of my record is maintained separately, scanned as an image, stored in legacy or archived systems, or held as handwritten documentation, I request that those records also be searched and produced.

I request that these records be provided in electronic format if possible. If electronic production is not available for some records, please provide paper copies of the remaining responsive records.

If any portion of the requested records is withheld, please provide all reasonably segregable portions and identify the basis for any withholding.

Please let me know if you need any additional identifying information to process this request.

Sincerely,  
Rosean Barnes  
March 5,2026

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 20 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

rosean barnes

title: Privacy Act and FOIA Request for Records Concerning Rosean Barnes

communications.subject: Freedom of Information Act Request: Privacy Act and FOIA Request for Records Concerning Rosean Barnes
communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Freedom of Information Act, I hereby request the following records:

To the NSA FOIA/Privacy Act Office,

I am submitting this request under the Privacy Act, 5 U.S.C. § 552a, and the Freedom of Information Act, 5 U.S.C. § 552, for any and all records maintained by the National Security Agency concerning me.

I am the individual who is the subject of these records, and I am making this request on my own behalf.


Identifying Information:
Full Name: Rosean Barnes
Date of Birth:11.29.1994
Current Address: 6956 Hanover Parkway unit 200
Greenbelt MD 20770
Telephone:2028978873
Email: roseanbarnes@gmail.com

Records Requested and Scope:  
I request copies of any and all records, files, correspondence, memoranda, reports, communications, database entries, indices, references, administrative records, intelligence related records, surveillance related records, or other documents maintained by the National Security Agency that concern me, relate to me, or identify me by name or personal identifiers.

Please conduct a search for records in which I am:
1. the primary subject of the file, and  
2. referenced, mentioned, indexed, or otherwise identified in any cross references, related files, or record systems.

Please search all records systems reasonably likely to contain responsive records retrievable by my name and the identifying information listed above.

Date Range:  
[All dates, or specify a range]

Format Requested:  
Please provide responsive records in electronic format if possible.

Fees:  
This request is for personal use. I agree to pay fees up to $[25.00 or other amount] without further authorization. If fees are expected to exceed that amount, please contact me before proceeding.

Segregability and Withholdings:  
If any portion of the requested records is withheld, please provide all reasonably segregable non exempt portions. For any withholding, please identify the specific exemption or exemptions relied upon.

Administrative Appeal:  
If this request is denied in whole or in part, please provide the reason for the denial and the procedures for filing an administrative appeal.

Identity Verification and Declaration:  
I declare under penalty of perjury that I am Rosean Barnes and that the information provided in this request is true and correct.

Sincerely,  
Rosean Barnes  
March 5,2026

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 20 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

rosean barnes

To Whom It May Concern:

To the CIA Privacy Coordinator,

I am submitting this request under the Privacy Act, 5 U.S.C. § 552a, and the Freedom of Information Act, 5 U.S.C. § 552, for any and all records maintained by the Central Intelligence Agency concerning me.

Full Name: Rosean Barnes
Date of Birth:11.29.1994
Current Address: 6956 Hanover Parkway unit 200
Greenbelt MD 20770
Telephone:2028978873
Email: roseanbarnes@gmail.com

Records Requested and Scope:  
I request copies of any and all records, files, correspondence, memoranda, reports, communications, database entries, indices, references, or other documents maintained by the CIA that concern me, relate to me, or identify me by name or personal identifiers.

Please conduct a search for records in which I am:
1. the primary subject of the file, and  
2. referenced, mentioned, indexed, or cross referenced in any other file or record system.

Please search all records systems reasonably likely to contain responsive material, including records retrievable by my name and the identifying information listed above.

Date Range:  
1995-2026

Format Requested:  
Please provide responsive records in electronic format if possible.

Fees:  
This request is for personal use. I understand that requests for records about oneself are generally processed without fees where applicable. If any fees may apply, please notify me before incurring them.

Segregability and Withholdings:  
If any portion of the requested records is withheld, please provide all reasonably segregable non exempt portions. For any withholding, please identify the specific exemption or exemptions relied upon.

Administrative Appeal:  
If this request is denied in whole or in part, please provide the reason for the denial and the procedures for filing an administrative appeal.

Identity Verification and Declaration:  
I declare under penalty of perjury that I am Rosean Barnes and that the information provided in this request is true and correct.

Sincerely,  
Rosean Barnes  
March 5,2026

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 20 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

rosean barnes
